signals.raw:
Elon Musk April Tweet Count Markets Lead Polymarket Chatter | NO whale bets or tips spotted | LOW confidence**

Polymarket's most active markets focus on **Elon Musk tweet predictions**, such as "# tweets April 17-24, 2026?" (crowd pricing "180-199" at 29%) and overall "Elon Musk # tweets in April 2026?" (18% on "1080-1119")[1][2][3]. These reflect real-time trader sentiment on pop culture events
